level_AA.name: Non-text Content
level_AA.description: All non-text content has a text alternative

level_AA.name: Info and Relationships
level_AA.description: Information, structure, and relationships can be programmatically determined

level_AA.name: Contrast (Minimum)
level_AA.description: Text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1

level_AA.name: Keyboard
level_AA.description: All functionality is available from a keyboard

level_AA.name: Focus Order
level_AA.description: Focusable components receive focus in logical order

level_AA.name: On Focus
level_AA.description: When component receives focus, it does not initiate change of context

level_AA.name: Labels or Instructions
level_AA.description: Labels or instructions are provided when content requires user input

level_AA.name: Name, Role, Value
level_AA.description: Name and role can be programmatically determined

loginPage.description: Elements must have sufficient color contrast
Form fields should not have multiple label elements
HTML element must have a lang attribute
Document should have one main landmark
Page should contain a level-one heading
All page content should be contained by landmarks
